description: RasterRelay Flux.2 Klein 9B GGUF hybrid workflow with RasterRelay custom nodes.

notes.maskChannel: LoadImageMask red channel. Plugin uploads the generation/denoise support mask; Photoshop layer visibility mask is applied separately.
notes.architecture: VAEDecode -> VaeDriftMatch(soft, 20) -> AreaMatch(strength 0.9, margin 40) -> ColorHarmonize(strength 0.9, interior 0.8, edge 1.2) -> PadToDocument.
notes.colorPipeline: VaeDriftMatch restores original pixels outside the mask with soft blending (radius 20). AreaMatch then corrects the ENTIRE generated area's exposure, contrast and color to match the surrounding original using full Reinhard LAB transfer (including luminance). ColorHarmonize finishes the edges with interior_weight=0.8 for strong seam correction.

customNodes.91: RasterRelayPadToDocument - pads full generated crop to full doc size with crop alpha
customNodes.12: RasterRelayMaskCropper - legacy helper, unused because the plugin uploads crop-local generation masks
customNodes.94: RasterRelayVaeDriftMatch - soft mask mode, blend_radius=20, restores unmasked pixels with smooth seam transition
customNodes.95: RasterRelayColorHarmonize - Reinhard LAB transfer on the seam region, margin=30, interior_weight=0.8, edge_boost=1.2
customNodes.99: RasterRelayAreaMatch - matches generated area's exposure/contrast/color to surrounding using full Reinhard LAB transfer (including luminance), strength=0.9, margin=40
